changeSet.author: cinex
changeSet.sql: UPDATE st SET st.vip_price = NULL FROM showtimes st WHERE st.vip_price IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM seats s WHERE s.room_id = st.room_id AND s.seat_type = 'VIP' AND s.storage_state = 'ACTIVE' AND s.status = 'AVAILABLE' )

changeSet.author: cinex
changeSet.sql: UPDATE st SET st.couple_price = NULL FROM showtimes st WHERE st.couple_price IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM seats s WHERE s.room_id = st.room_id AND s.seat_type = 'COUPLE' AND s.storage_state = 'ACTIVE' AND s.status = 'AVAILABLE' )

changeSet.author: cinex
changeSet.sql: UPDATE st SET st.sweetbox_price = NULL FROM showtimes st WHERE st.sweetbox_price IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM seats s WHERE s.room_id = st.room_id AND s.seat_type = 'SWEETBOX' AND s.storage_state = 'ACTIVE' AND s.status = 'AVAILABLE' )

changeSet.author: cinex
changeSet.sql: UPDATE st SET st.deluxe_price = NULL FROM showtimes st WHERE st.deluxe_price IS NOT NULL AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM seats s WHERE s.room_id = st.room_id AND s.seat_type = 'DELUXE' AND s.storage_state = 'ACTIVE' AND s.status = 'AVAILABLE' )
